title: 菊花賞の後に・三冠達成

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's done it! Symboli Rudolf has won her
third crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As excited as the commentary is, it's drowned out
entirely by the roar of the crowd. As soon as they
realized this race belonged to the Emperor, there
was no stopping their cheers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for your support. With this win...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The Triple Crown is mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An almost savage roar breaks out as a new Triple
Crown Champion is born.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I did it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I must say, it was thrilling to hear such a
large crowd cheering my name.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I went into this race thinking of it as nothing more
than a means to an end...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But the title of Triple Crown Champion... Well,
that does set my heart aflame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf basks in the cheers for a little
while longer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before lifting three fingers skyward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But her dream is only getting started!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now that I have claimed the Classic Triple Crown,
it is obvious where I must set my sights next.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The most fitting companion for the honors I
already wear is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Precisely.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Senior-year students will be taking part.
Competing against them will be a golden
opportunity to demonstrate my prowess.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And besides, if the fans choose me to participate,
that would be an honor in and of itself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even the Arima Kinen is but a stepping stone to
greater glories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we resolve to fix our sights on the Arima
Kinen...
I'm coming in.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Good work out there, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Brian. It's not often you come to watch me
race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was interested in seeing who the strongest
Umamusume was.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And as expected, it's you. Looks like the Kikuka
Sho was no sweat for the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I could hardly presume to give you orders if I
wasn't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to go toe-to-toe with you someday. You
look like an opponent worth sinking my teeth
into.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
By all means. I'm confident I can weather a gentle
nibble.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, enough of that. Is Air Groove not with
you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it was egotistical of me to assume that
she would be watching... Or could it be that she
has something to attend to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You know, probing people isn't really your speed.
You make it too obvious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's not what I—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Are you worried she won't follow you if you don't
keep an eye on her?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Never mind. Congrats on the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Get some rest. You've earned it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You know, Trainer... About what Brian just said—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, I'm from the newspaper. Do you have
a minute?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. Just give me a moment to get ready.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: We can pick this up later. The press is calling.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Between my new rank of Triple Crown Champion
and my future ambitions, I have plenty for them
to get excited about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, however, Symboli Rudolf winds up
swamped with interviews, and we never get the
chance to have that talk.
